summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open pull requests. No GitHub mutations are permitted. #91597 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive. The other four PRs remain non-mutating maintainer/preflight items: none has complete merge preflight proof with hydrated comments/review-bot comments and a recorded Codex /review pass. #92223 also has a failing check-test-types job and a broad 18-file compatibility/availability-risk delta, so it needs maintainer-guided repair before any merge recommendation.
